Tests the `toString` method of `Number.prototype` with a base of 2.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `toString` method on the `Number` prototype in JavaScript. It checks if calling `toString` with a radix of 2 on the `Number` prototype returns the string "0". This test ensures that the `toString` method correctly converts the number zero to its binary string representation. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of the `Number` object's behavior.
